name: Port Nyanzaru
summary: A bright, wealthy and dangerous harbour city ruled by merchant princes, filled with dinosaur races, jungle guides and foreign intrigue.
politics: Merchant Princes control trade, guides, beasts, magic and information.
Foreign powers court favour while avoiding open insult.
culture: Vibrant markets, colourful dress, public spectacle and sharp commercial instincts define the city.
Guides, sailors and adventurers gather where jungle rumours can be bought.
